path: Problem: Sum values where a text field contains a target substring but excludes entries that also contain digits
Action: Use SUMIF with wildcard criteria and subtract a second SUMIF that matches the same substring preceded by any single character (digit) pattern

Observation: In SUMIF wildcards, '?' matches exactly one character; using '?*' before the substring can be used to capture cases where a digit appears immediately before the target text, enabling exclusion via subtraction
